name: python3-aadict
title: python3-aadict
description:
Auto-Attribute Dict (Python 3)
This package contains a Python dict sub-class that allows attribute-style
access to dict items, e.g. d.foo is equivalent to d['foo']. aadict also
provides a few other helpful methods, such as pick and omit methods. Also, an
aadict is more call chaining friendly (e.g. methods such as update return
self) and is pickle'able.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aadict because Auto-Attribute Dict (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aadict as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aadict with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aadict --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
